ecarx.carext.security.pki

Interface IPKI

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface IPKI
extends BaseAPI
    This class provides the API for accessing PKI functionality.
    Since:
    6

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default java.lang.String getCertificateAlias()
      Get certificate alias
      default byte[] getECUIssuingCA()
      Get ECUIssuing Certificate Return null before certificate installation success
      default byte[] getGlobalPolicyCA()
      Get Global Policy CA Certificate Return null before certificate installation success
      default byte[] getRootCA()
      Get Root CA Certificate Return null before certificate installation success
      default byte[] getServicesIssuingCA()
      Get ServicesIssuing Certificate Return null before certificate installation success

      Request permission for KeyChain
      default boolean isKeyChainGranted()
      Check self permission for KeyChain
      default boolean isPrepared()
      Return the PKI current status
      default boolean registerPKIPreparedListener(PKIPreparedListener listener)
      Listen to PKI prepare status
      default boolean unregisterPKIPreparedListener(PKIPreparedListener listener)
      Remove listen to PKI prepare status

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

    • Method Detail

      • grantPermissionForKeyChain

        6

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_PKI")
default boolean isKeyChainGranted()

default boolean registerPKIPreparedListener(@NonNull

default boolean unregisterPKIPreparedListener(@NonNull

        Returns:

        @Nullable
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_PKI_CA")
